top_signals.title: Social Security gender gap means women receive about $4,800 less in annual benefits. What to know before claiming
top_signals.summary: Women tend to earn less and spend more time outside of the work force, which may reduce their Social Security benefits. Here's what to consider before claiming.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Elliott is becoming the hedge fund industry’s new ‘Tiger cub’ factory
top_signals.summary: The vaunted investor Paul Singer has spawned a small army of new firms mirroring Julian Robertson’s ‘Tiger cubs’
